components.name: Handwriting Recognition
components.description: Removes the handwriting recognition language feature for the installed language.
breaks: Pen and touch input to the handwriting panel no longer converts to text
The touch keyboard's handwriting mode disappears on tablets and 2-in-1s
Ink-to-text in OneNote, Journal and the Snipping Tool stops working

components.name: Optical Character Recognition
components.description: Removes the OCR language feature and the Windows OCR engine capability.
breaks: Text Actions in the Snipping Tool cannot extract text from a screenshot
PowerToys Text Extractor and similar tools built on the Windows OCR API return nothing
Searching for text inside scanned images and PDFs stops finding matches

components.name: Text-to-Speech Voices
components.description: Removes the text-to-speech voices for the installed language.
breaks: Narrator has no voice and is effectively unusable, which makes the machine inaccessible to blind users
Read Aloud in Edge, Word and the Immersive Reader goes silent
Any app using the speech synthesis API gets no audio and often no error

components.name: Speech Recognition
components.description: Removes the offline speech recognition language feature.
breaks: Voice typing (Win+H) and Voice Access stop working entirely
Windows Speech Recognition cannot be set up, removing a major accessibility path for users who cannot type
Dictation in Office and other apps that use the system recognizer fails

components.name: Math Recognizer
components.description: Removes the handwritten maths recognition capability used by the Math Input Panel.

components.name: Retail Demo Mode
components.description: Disables the in-store retail demo experience and its content cleanup task. Nothing outside a shop display ever uses it.
